title: Inspector Unsaved Draft
description: Studio artifact inspector MUST make edit state obvious and prevent silent data loss when the user closes the panel or navigates away with a dirty buffer.
context: Studio artifact inspector MUST make edit state obvious and prevent silent data loss when the user closes the panel or navigates away with a dirty buffer.

rules.requirement: dirty state derived from buffer vs saved content
rules: For editable change artifacts, the UI MUST treat the editor as dirty when `editorBuffer !== loadedArtifactContent` (after initial sync). Workspace canonical artifacts are never dirty in v1 (read-only).

When dirty, the inspector chrome MUST show a visible unsaved indicator adjacent to the Save control (icon or label). The indicator MUST clear after successful save when buffer matches new `originalHash` content.

rules.requirement: close and navigation require confirmation when dirty
rules:
When dirty, the following MUST open a modal with **Save**, **Discard**, and **Cancel**:

- closing the artifact panel (✕)
- selecting a different artifact in the same change
- selecting a different change or spec in the sidebar

**Cancel** MUST leave the panel open with buffer unchanged. **Discard** MUST proceed without save. **Save** MUST persist via `saveChangeArtifact` then proceed only on success.

rules.requirement: preview diff outline use draft pipelines when dirty
rules: While dirty, Preview and Diff MUST use [`core:preview-artifact-overrides`](../core/preview-artifact-overrides/spec.md) (POST preview). Outline MUST pass current buffer to outline draft endpoints. See [`ui:inspector-metadata-schema`](../inspector-metadata-schema/spec.md).
